prompt: Create a UserService class with @api() decorator that has baseURL https://api.example.com. Include a getUser(@path() id: number) method using @get() that returns Promise<User>, and a createUser(@body() user: User) method using @post(). Use NamedFetcher to register the fetcher.
expected_output: TypeScript file with UserService class using @ahoo-wang/fetcher-decorator package with proper decorators and types
expectations: The class is decorated with @api() decorator
@api() decorator uses baseURL https://api.example.com or path /users
getUser method is decorated with @get() decorator
@get() decorator uses path with {id} parameter placeholder
getUser method signature includes @path() decorator for id parameter
createUser method is decorated with @post() decorator
createUser method signature includes @body() decorator for user parameter
